title: CPVP Coconut Pack
description: A vibrant PVP texture pack that reimagines crystals, golden apples, pearls, obsidian, and anchors with custom animations and tropical flair. Perfect for competitive players who want a fresh, fun twist!
body:
[![CPVP STRAWBERRY](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-STRAWBERRY-ff4d6d?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cpvp-strawberry-pack)         [![CPVP BANANA](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-BANANA-ffd60a?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cpvp-banana-pack)         [![CPVP BLUEBERRY](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-BLUEBERRY-4361ee?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blueberry-cpvp-pack)         [![CPVP ORANGE](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-ORANGE-f77f00?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cpvp-orange-pack)         [![CPVP COCONUT](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-COCONUT-8d6e63?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cpvp-coconut-pack)         [![CPVP CARROT](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-CARROT-f48c06?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cpvp-carrot-pack)         [![CPVP LIME](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-LIME-38b000?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cpvp-lime-pack)         [![CPVP MANGO](https://img.shields.io/badge/CPVP-MANGO-ffb703?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cpvp-mango-pack)

CPVP Coconut Pack is a tropical-themed PVP pack that revamps key combat items with custom animations and textures.
Perfect for crystal PVP and competitive play.

Features:

- Animated Anchors

- Reworked golden apples

- Unique ender pearls

- Modified obsidian and anchors

- Small item models

- Clean GUI

- Low fire

- No explosion particles

- Optimized for performance

Fresh style. Smooth animations. No distractions.
